description: UI polish and consistency: active nav highlighting fix, mobile hamburger verify, table sorting globally, consistent card/grid styles across all pages
steps: Verify sidebar active state highlighting works correctly in base.html (it already exists - confirm the JS path matching logic handles /portfolio and /create-persona correctly). Add /portfolio to the path matching.
Verify mobile hamburger menu is already implemented in base.html (it is - openSidebar/closeSidebar/backdrop). Ensure portfolio page is included in bottom-nav.

Add a reusable table sorting utility function in base.html's script section or a new shared JS snippet. The function should: (1) Accept a table element. (2) On header click, sort rows by that column (numeric or string detection). (3) Toggle ascending/descending. (4) Show sort indicator arrow in header. Make this available globally so portfolio.html, watchlist.html, scanner.html can all use it.
Review all pages (watchlist.html, scanner.html, portfolio.html) to ensure they use the same card/grid/text CSS classes from bloomberg.css. Ensure consistency with index.html styling patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar highlights the correct active page for all routes including /portfolio
Mobile hamburger menu works and includes portfolio in bottom-nav
Table sorting works on all tables across portfolio, watchlist, scanner pages
All pages use consistent Bloomberg dark theme styling
